narrative:
Bowling Green Township (precinct in Licking County) has 1,274 registered voters, with 50.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.3 percentage points.
